mapper.sql: id, resource_no, parent_resource_no, resource_name, resource_type, request_path, label, data_state, sort_no, icon, create_time, update_time, remark, create_by, update_by
mapper.select:
select
distinct
from sys_resource
order by ${orderByClause}
mapper.insert:
SELECT LAST_INSERT_ID()
insert into sys_resource (resource_no, parent_resource_no, resource_name, resource_type, request_path, label, data_state, sort_no, icon, create_time, update_time, remark, create_by, update_by) values (#{resourceNo,jdbcType=VARCHAR}, #{parentResourceNo,jdbcType=VARCHAR}, #{resourceName,jdbcType=VARCHAR}, #{resourceType,jdbcType=CHAR}, #{requestPath,jdbcType=VARCHAR}, #{label,jdbcType=VARCHAR}, #{dataState,jdbcType=CHAR}, #{sortNo,jdbcType=INTEGER}, #{icon,jdbcType=VARCHAR}, #{createTime,jdbcType=TIMESTAMP}, #{updateTime,jdbcType=TIMESTAMP}, #{remark,jdbcType=VARCHAR}, #{createBy,jdbcType=BIGINT}, #{updateBy,jdbcType=BIGINT})

SELECT LAST_INSERT_ID()
insert into sys_resource
resource_no,
parent_resource_no,
resource_name,
resource_type,
request_path,
label,
data_state,
sort_no,
icon,
create_time,
update_time,
remark,
create_by,
update_by,
#{resourceNo,jdbcType=VARCHAR},
#{parentResourceNo,jdbcType=VARCHAR},
#{resourceName,jdbcType=VARCHAR},
#{resourceType,jdbcType=CHAR},
#{requestPath,jdbcType=VARCHAR},
#{label,jdbcType=VARCHAR},
#{dataState,jdbcType=CHAR},
#{sortNo,jdbcType=INTEGER},
#{icon,jdbcType=VARCHAR},
#{createTime,jdbcType=TIMESTAMP},
#{updateTime,jdbcType=TIMESTAMP},
#{remark,jdbcType=VARCHAR},
#{createBy,jdbcType=BIGINT},
#{updateBy,jdbcType=BIGINT},
mapper.update:
update sys_resource
id = #{record.id,jdbcType=BIGINT},
resource_no = #{record.resourceNo,jdbcType=VARCHAR},
parent_resource_no = #{record.parentResourceNo,jdbcType=VARCHAR},
resource_name = #{record.resourceName,jdbcType=VARCHAR},
resource_type = #{record.resourceType,jdbcType=CHAR},
request_path = #{record.requestPath,jdbcType=VARCHAR},
label = #{record.label,jdbcType=VARCHAR},
data_state = #{record.dataState,jdbcType=CHAR},
sort_no = #{record.sortNo,jdbcType=INTEGER},
icon = #{record.icon,jdbcType=VARCHAR},
create_time = #{record.createTime,jdbcType=TIMESTAMP},
update_time = #{record.updateTime,jdbcType=TIMESTAMP},
remark = #{record.remark,jdbcType=VARCHAR},
create_by = #{record.createBy,jdbcType=BIGINT},
update_by = #{record.updateBy,jdbcType=BIGINT},

update sys_resource set id = #{record.id,jdbcType=BIGINT}, resource_no = #{record.resourceNo,jdbcType=VARCHAR}, parent_resource_no = #{record.parentResourceNo,jdbcType=VARCHAR}, resource_name = #{record.resourceName,jdbcType=VARCHAR}, resource_type = #{record.resourceType,jdbcType=CHAR}, request_path = #{record.requestPath,jdbcType=VARCHAR}, label = #{record.label,jdbcType=VARCHAR}, data_state = #{record.dataState,jdbcType=CHAR}, sort_no = #{record.sortNo,jdbcType=INTEGER}, icon = #{record.icon,jdbcType=VARCHAR}, create_time = #{record.createTime,jdbcType=TIMESTAMP}, update_time = #{record.updateTime,jdbcType=TIMESTAMP}, remark = #{record.remark,jdbcType=VARCHAR}, create_by = #{record.createBy,jdbcType=BIGINT}, update_by = #{record.updateBy,jdbcType=BIGINT}

update sys_resource
resource_no = #{resourceNo,jdbcType=VARCHAR},
parent_resource_no = #{parentResourceNo,jdbcType=VARCHAR},
resource_name = #{resourceName,jdbcType=VARCHAR},
resource_type = #{resourceType,jdbcType=CHAR},
request_path = #{requestPath,jdbcType=VARCHAR},
label = #{label,jdbcType=VARCHAR},
data_state = #{dataState,jdbcType=CHAR},
sort_no = #{sortNo,jdbcType=INTEGER},
icon = #{icon,jdbcType=VARCHAR},
create_time = #{createTime,jdbcType=TIMESTAMP},
update_time = #{updateTime,jdbcType=TIMESTAMP},
remark = #{remark,jdbcType=VARCHAR},
create_by = #{createBy,jdbcType=BIGINT},
update_by = #{updateBy,jdbcType=BIGINT},
where id = #{id,jdbcType=BIGINT}

update sys_resource set resource_no = #{resourceNo,jdbcType=VARCHAR}, parent_resource_no = #{parentResourceNo,jdbcType=VARCHAR}, resource_name = #{resourceName,jdbcType=VARCHAR}, resource_type = #{resourceType,jdbcType=CHAR}, request_path = #{requestPath,jdbcType=VARCHAR}, label = #{label,jdbcType=VARCHAR}, data_state = #{dataState,jdbcType=CHAR}, sort_no = #{sortNo,jdbcType=INTEGER}, icon = #{icon,jdbcType=VARCHAR}, create_time = #{createTime,jdbcType=TIMESTAMP}, update_time = #{updateTime,jdbcType=TIMESTAMP}, remark = #{remark,jdbcType=VARCHAR}, create_by = #{createBy,jdbcType=BIGINT}, update_by = #{updateBy,jdbcType=BIGINT} where id = #{id,jdbcType=BIGINT}
